//: We can't simply inherit the generated .svelte-kit/tsconfig.json `include` (which would pull in vite.config.ts and crash svelte-check with 'forEachResolvedModule is not a function'). So we curate `include` — but crucially we add the generated SvelteKit `ambient.d.ts`/`non-ambient.d.ts`/`$types`, which carry `/// <reference types="@sveltejs/kit" />` and thus the REAL $app/* + $env/* + route types (no hand-written shim needed).
